---
title: "Data Organization in Spreadsheets for Ecologists"
image: ../img/ecology.png
categories:
  - Spreadsheets
  - Data Science
  - Environmental Science
---

![](../img/ecology.png){width=600 fig-align=center}

This activity was developed by [Data Carpentry](https://datacarpentry.org/) and has been adapted for use by STEMcoding.

## Links to Activity
* [Activity Landing Page](../EcologyLesson/landing/index.qmd)
